input_text: Makcik jual nasi lemak tepi jalan dah 20 tahun. Sekarang anak dia tolong bukak page Instagram, order pun dah boleh online. Bangga tengok usaha keluarga ni berkembang!
reason: Celebrating a family nasi lemak business expanding to social media. Positive entrepreneurship story.

input_text: Pasar malam Taman Connaught memang best lah. Setiap Rabu penuh sesak, peniaga pun ramai. Ada yang jual dari Kelantan, ada dari Sabah. Semua cari rezeki halal.
reason: Positive description of a famous night market with diverse vendors. Celebrates shared economic activity.

input_text: Saya baru start jual kuih raya kat Shopee. First month untung sikit je tapi Alhamdulillah ada orang repeat order. Slowly build customer base dulu.
reason: New online seller sharing early e-commerce experience on Shopee. Genuine small business journey.

input_text: Abang saya baru ambik franchise Marrybrown kat pekan kecil. Orang kampung happy sebab tak payah drive jauh dah. Business pun okay, weekend memang full house.
reason: Story about franchise expansion to small towns benefiting local communities. Positive economic development.

input_text: Dulu kerja kilang gaji RM1,500. Sekarang jual air balang kat pasar malam, sebulan boleh dapat RM3,000-4,000. Penat tapi berbaloi. Kunci dia konsisten dan jaga kualiti.
reason: Night market vendor sharing income comparison and business advice. Motivational entrepreneurship content.

input_text: Tips untuk seller baru Lazada: gambar produk kena cantik, reply customer cepat, dan harga kena kompetitif. Jangan lupa join campaign Lazada untuk boost visibility.
reason: Practical e-commerce selling tips for new Lazada sellers. Helpful business advice.

input_text: Pakcik jual cendol tepi jalan dah lebih 30 tahun. Anak-anak semua dah kerja bagus tapi dia masih nak jual sebab katanya dah jadi passion. Respect!
reason: Admiration for a long-time cendol hawker who continues out of passion. Positive community figure.

input_text: Koperasi nelayan kat Kuala Kedah memang tolong ramai. Diorang sediakan ais, jual minyak diesel murah, dan bantu market hasil tangkapan. Model bisnes macam ni patut dikembangkan.
reason: Praising fishing cooperative model that supports local fishermen. Constructive discussion of cooperative economics.

input_text: Baru register SSM untuk bisnes bakery saya. Kos pun tak mahal, RM60 je setahun. Lepas ni boleh la buka akaun bank bisnes dan apply loan TEKUN.
reason: Sharing practical steps for formalizing a small bakery business. Informative content about SSM registration.

input_text: Harga getah naik balik! Pekebun kecil macam ayah saya akhirnya boleh bernafas lega. Dulu masa harga jatuh, ramai yang terpaksa cari kerja sampingan.
reason: Relief about rubber price recovery for smallholders. Personal story about commodity price impact on families.

input_text: Kakak saya start bisnes tudung dari rumah masa PKP. Sekarang dah ada 3 orang pekerja dan warehouse sendiri. Dari RM500 modal jadi company. Inspirasi betul.
reason: Inspirational story of a home-based hijab business growing during MCO. Celebrates women entrepreneurship.

input_text: Food truck scene kat Cyberjaya makin meriah. Weekend mesti ada 10-15 truck berkumpul. Dari burger sampai la ke Thai food. Harga pun student-friendly.
reason: Positive description of food truck culture in Cyberjaya. Highlights affordable diverse food options.

input_text: SME kena faham pentingnya digitalisasi. Bukan setakat ada Facebook page, tapi kena ada sistem POS, inventory tracking, dan data pelanggan. Baru boleh scale up.
reason: Business digitalization advice for Malaysian SMEs. Constructive guidance on technology adoption.

input_text: Bapa saya tanam durian Musang King kat Raub. Dulu orang gelakkan, sekarang satu pokok boleh dapat RM2,000 semusim. Sabar dan usaha memang berbaloi.
reason: Success story of Musang King durian farming in Raub. Celebrates agricultural entrepreneurship and patience.

input_text: Peniaga pasar malam kena bayar cukai ke? Ramai yang tak tahu, tapi kalau pendapatan lebih RM34,000 setahun memang kena declare. Jangan main-main dengan LHDN.
reason: Tax awareness information for night market vendors. Helpful financial literacy content.

input_text: Mak saya buat sambal tempoyak homemade, jual kat WhatsApp group je. Sebulan boleh dapat extra RM800-1,000. Rezeki halal dari dapur sendiri.
reason: Home-based food business selling via WhatsApp. Celebrates micro-entrepreneurship.

input_text: Nak start food truck memang kena modal besar sikit. Truck secondhand pun dah RM30,000-50,000. Tapi kalau lokasi strategic dan makanan sedap, ROI dalam setahun boleh dapat balik.
reason: Realistic cost breakdown for starting a food truck business. Practical business planning content.

input_text: Bangga dengan usahawan Melayu yang berjaya macam Dato' Aliff Syukri. Dari jual produk kecantikan tepi jalan sampai jadi jutawan. Buktikan orang Melayu boleh berjaya.
reason: Pride in a Malay entrepreneur's rags-to-riches story. Motivational content without demeaning other groups.

input_text: Pekebun kecil kelapa sawit memang susah sekarang. Harga FFB turun, kos baja naik. Tapi kena terus bertahan, sebab tanah tu aset keluarga untuk generasi akan datang.
reason: Palm oil smallholder discussing economic challenges. Legitimate concern about commodity prices and costs.

input_text: Saya nelayan kat Kuala Terengganu. Musim tengkujuh memang tak boleh turun laut. Kena ada simpanan untuk 2-3 bulan takde income. Itulah realiti hidup nelayan.
reason: Fisherman sharing reality of seasonal income challenges during monsoon. Authentic livelihood story.

input_text: Warung makan kat kampung saya dah turun temurun 3 generasi. Resipi asli tak berubah. Itulah yang buat pelanggan setia datang balik. Heritage food business.
reason: Multi-generational family restaurant preserving heritage recipes. Positive cultural business story.

input_text: Koperasi pertanian kat Cameron Highlands tolong petani sayur dapat harga yang adil. Tak perlu jual murah kat orang tengah. Power of collective bargaining.
reason: Praising agricultural cooperative helping Cameron Highlands vegetable farmers. Constructive economic discussion.

input_text: Anak muda sekarang ramai yang pilih jadi rider Grab Food sebagai side income. Fleksibel, boleh atur masa sendiri. Tapi kena jaga kesihatan dan keselamatan jalan raya.
reason: Balanced view of gig economy work among Malaysian youth. Practical advice included.

input_text: Jual ikan masin homemade kat Shopee, packaging kena cantik dan vacuum seal. Customer nak rasa kampung tapi presentation kena urban. Adapt or die dalam e-commerce ni.
reason: E-commerce packaging advice for traditional food products. Business adaptation guidance.

input_text: TEKUN Nasional memang banyak tolong usahawan kecil. Loan mudah, tak perlu cagaran. Saya pinjam RM10,000 untuk modal jahit baju, Alhamdulillah dah bayar habis.
reason: Positive testimonial about TEKUN microfinance supporting small tailoring business. Financial inclusion story.

input_text: Baru balik dari lawatan ke kilang keropok Kuala Terengganu. Industri ni bagi employment kat ramai orang kampung. Dari proses ikan sampai packaging, semua manual. Kagum.
reason: Appreciation for keropok manufacturing industry providing rural employment. Positive economic observation.

input_text: Ladang udang kat Perak sekarang guna teknologi IoT untuk monitor kualiti air. Pekebun kecil pun boleh afford sebab ada subsidi kerajaan. Smart farming is the future.
reason: Technology adoption in prawn farming with government subsidies. Positive agricultural modernization story.

input_text: Gerai char kuey teow makcik kat Penang ni viral sebab anak dia buat TikTok. Sekarang queue 1 jam pun orang sanggup tunggu. Digital marketing power!
reason: Hawker stall going viral through TikTok marketing. Celebrates digital-savvy family business.

input_text: Saya berhenti kerja korporat untuk ambil alih kedai runcit arwah ayah. Orang kata rugi, tapi bagi saya ni legacy. Revenue tak besar macam gaji dulu, tapi hidup lebih bermakna.
reason: Personal story of leaving corporate to continue father's sundry shop legacy. Meaningful entrepreneurship narrative.

input_text: Projek sosial enterprise kat Sabah ni buat kraftangan dari rotan. Bagi income kat orang asli dan jaga alam sekitar. Win-win business model yang patut disokong.
reason: Social enterprise empowering indigenous communities through rattan crafts. Positive sustainable business model.

input_text: Harga sawit naik, pekebun kecil akhirnya boleh upgrade rumah dan hantar anak sekolah. Komoditi ni memang tulang belakang ekonomi rakyat di kawasan luar bandar.
reason: Palm oil price increase benefiting rural smallholders. Celebrates commodity impact on family welfare.

input_text: Eksport durian ke China makin meningkat. Petani kat Pahang dan Johor senyum lebar. Tapi kena jaga kualiti, jangan sampai nama Malaysia terjejas sebab durian tak berkualiti.
reason: Discussion on durian export growth with quality control reminder. Constructive agricultural trade commentary.

input_text: Pasar tani setiap Ahad memang tempat terbaik nak beli sayur segar direct dari petani. Harga murah, kualiti terjamin, dan kita support local farmers. Semua untung.
reason: Promoting farmers' markets for fresh produce. Supports local agricultural economy.

input_text: Generasi muda tak nak sambung bisnes keluarga sebab nak kerja office. Tapi siapa yang nak teruskan warisan makanan tradisional kita? Kena ada balance.
reason: Concern about generational succession in traditional food businesses. Thoughtful cultural economic discussion.

input_text: Modal RM200 je untuk start jual air soya kat pasar malam. Margin untung tinggi, demand pun sentiasa ada. Bisnes kecil tapi steady.
reason: Low-cost business idea for night market soy drink vendor. Practical micro-business content.

input_text: Started my Shopee store selling batik accessories last year. Now averaging 200 orders per month. The key is consistency in posting and really good product photos.
reason: E-commerce success story selling batik accessories on Shopee. Practical business growth advice.

input_text: Night market culture in Malaysia is honestly one of the best things about this country. Where else can you get a full meal for RM5 and support local entrepreneurs at the same time?
reason: Appreciation for Malaysian night market culture and its economic accessibility. Positive cultural observation.

input_text: My uncle has been running a roti canai stall for 25 years. He put all 4 kids through university with that income. Hawkers are the backbone of Malaysia's food economy.
reason: Tribute to hawker uncle who funded children's education. Celebrates hawker contribution to society.

input_text: Just attended a MDEC workshop on digital marketing for SMEs. Really eye-opening stuff about SEO and social media ads. Malaysian businesses need to embrace digital transformation.
reason: Positive review of government digital skills workshop for SMEs. Promotes business education.

input_text: The fishing community in Kuala Selangor is so tight-knit. They share resources, help each other repair boats, and collectively negotiate with buyers. True gotong-royong spirit.
reason: Praising cooperative spirit among Kuala Selangor fishing community. Positive social cohesion story.

input_text: Food truck business in KL is booming but the permit process is still a nightmare. We need clearer regulations and designated spots. It would help so many young entrepreneurs.
reason: Constructive criticism about food truck permit regulations. Advocates for better policy to support entrepreneurs.

input_text: Proud to say our family's rubber smallholding in Kedah has been operating for 3 generations. It's hard work but the land is our legacy. Hoping prices stay stable.
reason: Multi-generational rubber smallholder pride in Kedah. Authentic agricultural family story.

input_text: Malaysian social enterprises are doing amazing work. From upcycled fashion to zero-waste groceries, young Malaysians are proving you can do business and do good at the same time.
reason: Celebrating Malaysian social enterprise movement. Positive commentary on purpose-driven business.

input_text: Just got approved for a SME Bank loan to expand my bakery. The process was smoother than I expected. If you have a solid business plan, don't be afraid to apply.
reason: Positive experience with SME Bank loan application. Encourages other small business owners.

input_text: The Lazada seller community in Malaysia is actually really supportive. People share tips on logistics, pricing strategies, and how to handle difficult customers. Love this ecosystem.
reason: Appreciating supportive Lazada seller community. Positive e-commerce ecosystem observation.

input_text: My friend quit her banking job to start a craft chocolate business using Sabah cocoa beans. People said she was crazy but now she's exporting to Singapore and Japan. Respect.
reason: Inspirational career-switch story into craft chocolate using local cocoa. Celebrates agricultural value-add business.

input_text: Running a small kopitiam is no joke. Rent keeps going up, staff turnover is high, and margins are thin. But when regulars come in and smile, it makes it all worth it.
reason: Honest account of kopitiam business challenges balanced with personal fulfillment. Authentic F&B owner perspective.

input_text: Cameron Highlands strawberry farmers are now doing agritourism. Visitors pay to pick their own strawberries and learn about farming. Smart diversification of income streams.
reason: Praising agricultural diversification into agritourism. Positive rural economic innovation.

input_text: Cooperatives like FELCRA and FELDA have literally built the rural middle class in Malaysia. Say what you want about them, but they transformed millions of lives through agriculture.
reason: Acknowledging historical impact of agricultural cooperatives on rural development. Balanced economic commentary.

input_text: The hawker succession problem is real. Young people don't want to wake up at 4am to prepare food. We need to find ways to make traditional food businesses more sustainable and attractive.
reason: Thoughtful discussion about hawker business sustainability and generational transition. Constructive concern.

input_text: I sell homemade pineapple tarts online during Chinese New Year season. In just 3 weeks I make enough to cover 2 months of expenses. Seasonal business but very lucrative.
reason: Seasonal home-based food business during Chinese New Year. Practical income generation story.

input_text: Local coffee roasters in Penang and KL are putting Malaysia on the specialty coffee map. Using beans from Sabah and supporting local farmers. This is the kind of value chain we need.
reason: Celebrating Malaysian specialty coffee industry supporting local bean farmers. Positive value chain discussion.

input_text: SME challenges in Malaysia: high compliance costs, difficulty accessing financing, talent shortage, and digital literacy gaps. But with the right support ecosystem, we can overcome these.
reason: Balanced analysis of SME challenges in Malaysia with optimistic outlook. Constructive business commentary.

input_text: My grandmother's kuih business started from her kitchen. Now my mom runs it from a proper workshop with 10 staff. Next generation, I plan to franchise it. Family legacy growing.
reason: Three-generation kuih business growth story with franchise ambitions. Inspirational family business narrative.

input_text: Best decision I made was joining a night market vendor association. We negotiate lot prices together, share info about good locations, and even do group purchases for packaging materials.
reason: Benefits of collective organization among night market vendors. Positive cooperative commerce.

input_text: Palm oil smallholders often get overlooked in the sustainability debate. Most of us practice responsible farming on small plots. We're not the ones clearing massive forests.
reason: Smallholder perspective on palm oil sustainability debate. Legitimate defense of small-scale farming practices.

input_text: Malaysian handicraft sellers on Etsy are killing it globally. Batik, pewter, songket — our traditional crafts have international appeal. We just need better marketing infrastructure.
reason: Celebrating Malaysian craft sellers succeeding on global platforms. Advocates for marketing support.

input_text: 我在槟城开了一家小小的炒粿条档口，每天凌晨四点就要起来准备。虽然辛苦，但看到顾客吃得开心，一切都值得了。
reason: Char kuey teow hawker in Penang sharing daily routine and passion for the trade. Authentic hawker story.

input_text: 在Shopee上卖手工肉干，过年前那几个星期忙到不行。从接单、制作到包装全部自己来。小本生意就是这样，辛苦但充实。
reason: Homemade bak kwa seller on Shopee during festive season. Authentic micro-business experience.

input_text: 爸爸的咖啡店在怡保开了四十年了。从我小时候就在店里帮忙，现在轮到我接手了。白咖啡的配方不能丢，这是我们家的传承。
reason: Family kopitiam succession story in Ipoh preserving white coffee recipe. Heritage business narrative.

input_text: 夜市摆摊卖臭豆腐，一个晚上可以赚三四百块。别看不起小生意，积少成多，我已经存够钱买了一辆二手车。
reason: Night market stinky tofu vendor sharing income and savings achievement. Motivational small business story.

input_text: 大马的华人合作社在乡村地区做了很多贡献。从提供贷款到帮助农民销售农产品，这种互助模式很值得推广。
reason: Praising Chinese cooperative contributions in rural areas. Positive discussion of cooperative economic models.

input_text: 朋友在Lazada上卖本地零食，一年内从月销百单做到月销五千单。关键是找到好的供应商和做好客户服务。电商真的改变了很多人的生活。
reason: E-commerce success story of snack seller on Lazada. Highlights supply chain and customer service importance.

input_text: 金马仑菜农现在也开始用智能温室种菜了。虽然初期投资大，但产量和品质都提高了不少。科技农业是未来的方向。
reason: Smart greenhouse farming adoption in Cameron Highlands. Positive agricultural technology story.

input_text: 我妈在巴刹卖了二十年的鱼丸。每天手工制作，从不偷工减料。现在很多老顾客都带着孙子来光顾了。这就是信誉的力量。
reason: Long-time fishball seller in wet market known for quality. Celebrates trust-based business relationships.

input_text: 小型企业最头痛的就是请人。年轻人都不愿意做辛苦工，请外劳手续又复杂。希望政府能简化一些流程，帮帮中小企业。
reason: SME labor shortage challenges and appeal for streamlined processes. Constructive business policy feedback.

input_text: 槟城的社会企业越来越多了。有做环保的，有帮助残障人士的，也有推广本地文化的。年轻一代的创业理念真的不一样了。
reason: Growing social enterprise movement in Penang. Celebrates purpose-driven youth entrepreneurship.

input_text: 表哥在东马种胡椒，砂拉越的胡椒品质全球闻名。虽然价格波动大，但他坚持有机种植，走高端市场路线。
reason: Sarawak pepper farming with organic premium market strategy. Positive agricultural export story.

input_text: 做生意最重要的是诚信。我开杂货店三十年，从不短斤缺两。顾客信任你了，生意自然就好。
reason: Veteran grocery store owner emphasizing integrity in business. Values-based entrepreneurship.

input_text: 疫情之后很多小贩转型做外卖，学会用GrabFood和FoodPanda。虽然佣金高，但至少还有生意做。适应变化是生存之道。
reason: Post-pandemic food delivery platform adoption by hawkers. Practical business adaptation story.

input_text: 马来西亚的榴莲出口到中国越来越多了。以前只有泰国的，现在猫山王已经成为中国市场的抢手货。对果农来说是天大的好消息。
reason: Malaysian durian export growth to China market. Positive agricultural trade news for farmers.

input_text: எங்க அப்பா கடலூர் மீனவர். இப்போ மலேசியாவில் இருந்தாலும், மீன் வியாபாரம் பண்றார். குவா லா செலாங்கூர்ல சின்ன மீன் கடை வச்சிருக்கார். நல்லாவே ஓடுது.
reason: Tamil fishmonger running a small shop in Kuala Selangor. Authentic immigrant entrepreneurship story.

input_text: இரவு சந்தையில் ரொட்டி திசு விக்கிறோம். ஒரு நாளைக்கு RM300-400 வருமானம் வரும். கஷ்டமான வேலை, ஆனா சொந்த முதலாளியா இருக்கிறது பெருமை.
reason: Night market roti tissue vendor sharing daily income. Pride in self-employment.

input_text: என் அம்மா வீட்டிலேயே முறுக்கு, லட்டு செய்து Deepavali நேரத்தில் விக்கிறாங்க. WhatsApp-ல ஆர்டர் வாங்குறாங்க. ஒரு மாசத்துல RM5,000 சம்பாதிப்பாங்க.
reason: Home-based Deepavali snack business taking WhatsApp orders. Seasonal micro-enterprise.

input_text: கிள்ளான் பகுதியில் இந்திய உணவகங்கள் நிறைய இருக்கு. போட்டி அதிகம், ஆனா தரமான உணவு கொடுத்தா வாடிக்கையாளர் நிச்சயம் வருவாங்க.
reason: Indian restaurant competition in Klang area with quality-focused business advice. Healthy market competition.

input_text: Shopee-ல் சேலை விக்கிறேன். இந்தியாவிலிருந்து நேரடியா import பண்ணி, நல்ல விலையில் விக்கிறேன். மலேசிய இந்தியர்களுக்கு நல்ல demand இருக்கு.
reason: Sari seller importing from India and selling on Shopee. Niche e-commerce business story.

input_text: என் தாத்தா தோட்டத் தொழிலாளியா வந்தார். இப்போ எங்க குடும்பம் சொந்தமா ரப்பர் தோட்டம் வச்சிருக்கோம். மூன்று தலைமுறை உழைப்பின் பலன்.
reason: Three-generation journey from estate worker to rubber smallholder owner. Inspirational family progress story.

input_text: பிரிக் ஃபீல்ட்ஸ் பகுதியில் சிறு வியாபாரிகளுக்கு வாடகை ரொம்ப அதிகம். ஆனாலும் location நல்லா இருக்கிறதால வியாபாரம் நடக்குது. Adjust பண்ணிக்கணும்.
reason: Small traders discussing high rent in Brickfields area. Balanced view of business costs vs location benefits.

input_text: தமிழ்ப் பள்ளிக்கு fund raise பண்ண charity food sale நடத்தினோம். community எல்லாரும் சேர்ந்து உதவினாங்க. RM15,000 சேகரிச்சோம். Teamwork makes the dream work.
reason: Community charity food sale fundraising for Tamil school. Positive civic and community enterprise.

input_text: FAMA-வோட farmers market-ல் காய்கறி விக்கிறேன். நேரடியா வாடிக்கையாளர்களுக்கு விக்கலாம், இடைத்தரகர் இல்ல. விவசாயிகளுக்கு நல்ல scheme.
reason: Farmer selling vegetables at FAMA market without middlemen. Positive agricultural direct-sales model.

input_text: என் மனைவி home baker. Instagram-ல் cake order வாங்குறாங்க. Birthday cake, wedding cake எல்லாம் customize பண்றாங்க. Talent இருந்தா business எங்கயும் start பண்ணலாம்.
reason: Home baker wife taking cake orders on Instagram. Celebrates talent-based micro-entrepreneurship.

input_text: Abang tu jual nasi kandar, wife dia jual kuih, anak handle social media and delivery. True family business vibes. Teamwork yang power!
reason: Family-run food business with each member contributing. Mixed Malay-English celebrating teamwork.

input_text: Bro, aku start jual t-shirt custom kat Shopee. First month memang struggle, tapi now dah consistent 50 orders sebulan. Patience is key lah dalam e-commerce ni.
reason: Custom t-shirt seller sharing Shopee growth journey. Motivational e-commerce content in casual Malay-English.

input_text: Night market punya vibe memang unmatched. Bau satay, bunyi orang tawar-menawar, lampu warna-warni. Ni bukan sekadar tempat jual beli, it's a whole experience.
reason: Atmospheric description of night market culture. Celebrates Malaysian market experience.

input_text: Pakcik ni dah 60 tahun tapi still hustle jual rojak every single day. Rain or shine, dia tetap datang. That kind of dedication you cannot buy lah. Salute.
reason: Admiration for elderly rojak vendor's dedication. Celebrates hawker work ethic in mixed language.

input_text: Lepas attend PUNB entrepreneurship workshop, baru faham betapa pentingnya proper financial management. Bukan revenue je kena track, expenses pun kena monitor closely.
reason: Business workshop takeaways on financial management. Educational entrepreneurship content.

input_text: 我朋友 baru open satu bubble tea shop kat SS2. Competition memang sengit but dia punya unique selling point is using gula Melaka. So far business not bad!
reason: Bubble tea shop with gula Melaka twist in SS2. Chinese-Malay-English mixed language business story.

input_text: Aku kerja as Grab driver sambil build my own online business. Gig economy ni bagi flexibility untuk pursue your dreams while still having income. Best of both worlds.
reason: Gig economy worker building side business. Positive perspective on flexible work arrangements.

input_text: Food truck kat area Shah Alam ni memang laku keras. Especially yang jual Western food macam burgers and steaks. Young crowd suka, harga pun affordable compared to restaurants.
reason: Food truck business in Shah Alam targeting young customers. Positive food entrepreneurship observation.

input_text: Social enterprise kat Malaysia still quite new compared to Western countries, but we're getting there lah. More young people are thinking about impact, bukan profit je.
reason: Observing growth of social enterprise movement in Malaysia. Balanced and encouraging commentary.

input_text: Kawan aku jual ikan kering online, packaging cantik gila macam premium gift hamper. Benda biasa pun kalau presentation power, boleh jual harga tinggi. Marketing genius.
reason: Premium packaging strategy for dried fish online sales. Creative marketing observation.

input_text: Cooperative model memang bagus untuk farmers kat rural area. Pooling resources together, negotiate better prices, share equipment. This is how small players compete with big ones.
reason: Advocating cooperative model for rural farmers. Constructive economic discussion in mixed language.

input_text: Makcik jual nasi lemak tepi highway tu dah famous sampai ada review kat Google Maps. 4.8 stars bro! Proof yang quality food always wins regardless of location.
reason: Highway nasi lemak vendor gaining Google Maps fame. Celebrates food quality over fancy location.

input_text: Bisnes franchise memang senang sikit sebab dah ada system. Tapi initial investment tinggi and you kena follow their rules. Ada pros and cons, kena weigh carefully.
reason: Balanced analysis of franchise business pros and cons. Practical entrepreneurship advice.

input_text: Amma saya jual thosai kat kedai mamak dulu, now dia dah open own restaurant. From worker to owner, that's the Malaysian dream right there. So proud of her.
reason: Mother's journey from mamak worker to restaurant owner. Mixed Tamil-Malay-English inspirational story.

input_text: Export agricultural products from Malaysia to Middle East market is growing. Dates, halal food products, palm oil — our strategic advantage is the halal certification credibility.
reason: Discussion of Malaysian agricultural exports to Middle East. Positive trade and halal certification advantage.

input_text: I learned to bake entirely from YouTube tutorials. Now I take 20-30 cake orders a month from my home kitchen. The internet has truly leveled the playing field for aspiring entrepreneurs in Malaysia.
reason: Self-taught home baker leveraging free online resources. Celebrates internet-enabled skill development and entrepreneurship.

input_text: The beauty of pasar malam is that anyone can start. Low barrier to entry — just a table, your product, and determination. Many Malaysian millionaires started exactly like this.
reason: Encouraging message about low-barrier entrepreneurship through night markets. Motivational content.

input_text: 真的很佩服那些在pasar malam摆摊的uncle aunty。大热天站一整晚，还要笑脸迎人。他们才是真正的entrepreneur。
reason: Admiration for hardworking night market vendors. Chinese-Malay mixed language appreciation.

input_text: 大马的渔业虽然不如棕油出名，但对沿海社区来说是非常重要的经济来源。政府应该多投资在渔港基础设施和冷链物流上，帮助渔民获得更好的收入。
reason: Advocating for fishing industry infrastructure investment to benefit coastal communities. Constructive economic policy suggestion.
